title: The rookie (TUTORIAL)
desc:
You simply break into a resident house. 
Simple job: just steal a few valuables and get out
requiredLoadoutDesc:
Required loadout: 
General: Flashlight
Electrical Engineer: Wire x5 and Drill; 
Mechanical Engineer: Lockpick

title: The intel
desc:
So the previous mission gave us some money with some intel with it. Apparently the owner
is working in a security company. Intel said that there will be a deliver of gold on 20th November, so it's
best to hit the premise during their lunch.
Though keep in mind that police patrol is nearby, so response time will be imminent
